title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 138.080 - Adjustment of tax books
text:
138.080.  Adjustment of tax books. — In case the report of equalization from the state tax commission be not received before or during the session of the county board of equalization, then it shall be the duty of the county clerk to adjust the tax books according to such report when received.
(RSMo 1939 § 11007, A.L. 1945 p. 1775) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9817; 1919 § 12826; 1909 § 11408
